name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new backend, parser, workflow improvement, or integration
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Fits Paper-Reach

Explain how it supports the project philosophy:

- evidence-based screening
- lightweight scaffolding
- agent-friendly workflows

## Possible Design Notes

Optional implementation ideas, schema changes, or CLI ideas.
